name: Golf Universe at Canyon Lakes
address: 3700B W Canyon Lakes Dr, Kennewick, WA 99337
about: Golf Universe at Canyon Lakes is a golf training and fitting facility located in Kennewick, WA. They offer a range of services including club fitting, lessons, and club repair, utilizing advanced technology like Trackman bays and the SAM PuttLab. The facility provides an indoor environment for golf practice and instruction, with a focus on data-driven club fitting and improvement. They operate with a new location at Canyon Lakes and accept walk-ins for their premier club fitting services.
why_golfers_like_it: Comprehensive club fitting with 40+ data parameters
Access to advanced Trackman and SAM PuttLab technology
Indoor environment for year-round practice and lessons
Expert coaching available for skill development
Convenient walk-in services for club fitting

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional grade launch monitor for club fitting
World's most accurate and comprehensive putt analysis system

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The facility offers club fitting services, so you can use their equipment during your session, but bringing your own clubs is also welcomed for fitting or repair.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being allowed at the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The facility focuses on practice, fitting, and lessons rather than full rounds of golf, so 18-hole time is not applicable.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific mention of child-friendly amenities or programs, so it appears geared more toward adult golfers.
